issues.description: AttachDon action missing required condition: should only target [Monkey.D.Luffy] characters. Current target scope is too broad.
Duplicate Trigger effect with identical PowerBoost action. DSL contains redundant effect entry that should be consolidated into single Activated effect.
AttachDon should specify condition that card must be resting (HasRestingDon or similar validation may be implicit in scope, but condition clarity recommended).
